title: Civil Engineering Department Overview
content: The Civil Engineering department at RGMCET was established in 2008. It offers B.Tech in Civil Engineering with an intake of 120 and M.Tech in Computer Aided Structural Engineering with an intake of 18. The department provides quality education supported by experienced faculty, modern laboratories, and strong infrastructure.
text_for_embedding: Civil Engineering Department Overview | Category: departments | Subcategory: overview | Department: ce | Keywords: RGMCET civil engineering, civil department overview, BTech civil intake, MTech structural engineering, civil engineering RGMCET | The Civil Engineering department at RGMCET was established in 2008. It offers B.Tech in Civil Engineering with an intake of 120 and M.Tech in Computer Aided Structural Engineering with an intake of 18. The department provides quality education supported by experienced faculty, modern laboratories, and strong infrastructure.

title: Civil Engineering Vision and Mission
content: The department aims to provide value-based civil engineering education that produces socially responsible professionals. It focuses on innovation, research orientation, leadership, teamwork, and strong industry collaboration.
text_for_embedding: Civil Engineering Vision and Mission | Category: departments | Subcategory: overview | Department: ce | Keywords: civil engineering vision, civil mission RGMCET, civil department goals, engineering leadership, civil education objectives | The department aims to provide value-based civil engineering education that produces socially responsible professionals. It focuses on innovation, research orientation, leadership, teamwork, and strong industry collaboration.

title: Civil Engineering Faculty
content: The Civil Engineering department is headed by Dr. G. Sreenivasulu and supported by qualified professors, associate professors, and assistant professors contributing to teaching and research.

Sreenivasulu and supported by qualified professors, associate professors, and assistant professors contributing to teaching and research.

title: Civil Engineering Programs
content: The department offers B.Tech in Civil Engineering under multiple regulations and M.Tech in Structural Engineering with semester-wise curriculum.

title: Civil Engineering Research
content: The Civil Engineering department conducts research in Structural Engineering, Water Resources, Environmental Engineering, Remote Sensing, GIS, and Machine Learning applications in civil engineering.

title: Civil Engineering Laboratories
content: The department has advanced laboratories including Concrete Technology Lab, Engineering Geology Lab, Environmental Engineering Lab, Geotechnical Lab, CAD & GIS Lab, Strength of Materials Lab, Survey Labs, Transportation Lab, and Advanced Structural Engineering Lab.

title: Electrical and Electronics Engineering Department Overview
content: The Electrical and Electronics Engineering (EEE) department at RGMCET offers B.Tech, M.Tech in Power Electronics, and Ph.D programs. The department has an intake of 120 students and is supported by well-equipped laboratories and experienced faculty.

The department has an intake of 120 students and is supported by well-equipped laboratories and experienced faculty.

content: The EEE department is supported by experienced faculty members including Dr. V. Naga Bhaskar Reddy, Dr. B. Rami Reddy, Dr. K. Bramhanandam, Dr. B. M. Manjunatha, and others contributing to teaching and research.

title: EEE Department Achievements
content: The EEE department has received several recognitions including ISTE Best B.Tech Project Award, Smart India Hackathon Award, and installation of a 500 kW rooftop solar plant along with multiple GATE qualifications by students.

title: Mechanical Engineering Department Overview
content: The Mechanical Engineering department at RGMCET offers B.Tech in Mechanical Engineering, M.Tech in Energy Engineering, and Ph.D programs. The department has an intake of 120 students and focuses on energy systems, thermal sciences, and manufacturing technologies supported by experienced faculty and laboratory infrastructure.

title: Electronics and Communication Engineering Department Overview
content: The Electronics and Communication Engineering (ECE) department at RGMCET offers B.Tech in ECE, M.Tech in VLSI Design, and Ph.D programs. The department has an intake of 240 students and is supported by advanced laboratories in communication systems, signal processing, and VLSI design along with experienced faculty.

title: Computer Science and Engineering Department Overview
content: The Computer Science and Engineering (CSE) department at RGMCET offers B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering, M.Tech in Computer Science, and Ph.D programs. The department has an intake of 420 students and focuses on software engineering, artificial intelligence, data science, and advanced computing technologies supported by experienced faculty and modern laboratories.
